pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 language features and potentially causing runtime issues if Java 21-specific APIs are used.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with Java 21.

src/main/java/maven/Brute.java.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for path construction.
Replace deprecated Runtime.exec(String) with Runtime.exec(String[]) to avoid ambiguity and deprecation warnings.

src/main/java/maven/DB.java.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for SQL query construction.
src/main/java/maven/DB.java.before: String.format("select CONTRACT_DEFINATION_UID from contract_defination where APPLICATION_NUMBER_ALIAS = '%s' order by issue_date desc", oaNo)
src/main/java/maven/DB.java.after: "select CONTRACT_DEFINATION_UID from contract_defination where APPLICATION_NUMBER_ALIAS = '%s' order by issue_date desc".formatted(oaNo)

src/main/java/maven/DB.java.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for SQL update statement construction.
src/main/java/maven/DB.java.before: String.format("update distribution_outage set CONTRACT_DEFINATION_UID = %d where oa_number = '%s'", cdID, oaNo)
src/main/java/maven/DB.java.after: "update distribution_outage set CONTRACT_DEFINATION_UID = %d where oa_number = '%s'".formatted(cdID, oaNo)

src/main/java/maven/Downloader.java.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for string interpolation.
Replace URL constructor with URI.create().toURL() to avoid checked exception.

src/main/java/maven/Loader.java.general_idea: Replace direct URL constructor with URI.create().toURL() to adhere to stricter security or API usage patterns often enforced in modern Java versions.
src/main/java/maven/Loader.java.why_exists: The URL(String) constructor is deprecated for security reasons in newer JDKs and may throw exceptions or be flagged by strict linters/compilers in Java 21 environments depending on configuration, though primarily this is a modernization of API usage.

src/main/java/maven/Loader.java.general_idea: Add import for java.net.URI to support the new URL creation method.

src/main/java/maven/REST.java.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for modern API usage.
Replace String.format() with String.formatted() for modern string interpolation.
Replace String.format() with String.formatted() for modern string interpolation.
Replace String.format() with String.formatted() for modern string interpolation.
